description: Rabbu is a marketplace and analytics platform for short-term rental and Airbnb investors to find, evaluate, buy, sell, and finance rental properties. Its website also provides market data and tools related to Airbnb investment properties.
summary: Rabbu exposes a public MCP server at `https://rabbu.com/mcp`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `rabbu.com`.
